site.name: Laxmi Dairy Farm
site.tagline: Pure milk, pure tradition, pure care since 1985

home.heroHeadline: From Our Heart to Your Home
home.heroSub: Pure A2 milk from indigenous cows, raised with love on the foothills of nature
home.feature1Desc: Our cows graze on chemical-free pastures and eat naturally cultivated fodder
home.feature2Desc: From Gir, Sahiwal & Tharparkar — the A2 protein your family deserves
home.feature3Desc: Spacious cowsheds, daily grooming, and Vedic music for happy, healthy cows
home.feature4Desc: Round-the-clock veterinary care ensures every cow is healthy and thriving
home.ourStoryText: Laxmi Dairy Farm started in 1985 with just 4 cows and a dream — to bring the purest milk to every Indian home. Today, our family-run farm spans 25 acres with over 200 healthy cows, blending ancient Indian dairy wisdom with modern animal husbandry. Every drop of milk that leaves our farm carries our promise of purity, ethics, and respect for the gentle gau mata.
home.breedsSub: Indigenous and exotic — each with a unique story
home.knowledgeSub: Learn about cow care, diseases, and dairy farming
home.trainingSub: Hands-on training programs for aspiring farmers
home.newsletterSub: Get farm news, dairy recipes, and seasonal offers

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: A family legacy of pure milk and ethical farming
about.founderQuote: When I started this farm in 1985, my only dream was to give every child the same pure milk I drank growing up in the village. Today, that dream lives in every bottle we deliver.
about.teamSub: The hands that care for our cows every single day
